scenarios.title: Assessment freshness is evaluated before current-site claims are used
scenarios.given: An assessment input includes a scan date that is stale or missing
scenarios.when: the generator prepares a client website build brief
scenarios.then: the output flags the assessment freshness risk and requires verification before making current-site claims

scenarios.title: Missing client details become questions instead of invented claims
scenarios.given: client intake is missing reviews, licenses, service guarantees, service areas, staff names, or project proof
scenarios.when: the generator prepares the brief and Codex build prompt
scenarios.then: the output lists the missing details as client questions or content-needed items and does not invent the claims

scenarios.title: Generated client artifacts are client-safe
scenarios.given: the generator has access to central MDE context and project-specific client inputs
scenarios.when: it produces a launch pack for a future client repo
scenarios.then: the launch pack includes only client-safe local MDE seeds and excludes central private ledgers, cross-client lessons, and confidential internal strategy

scenarios.title: Required launch pack artifacts are generated together
scenarios.given: valid assessment evidence and required client intake are available
scenarios.then: it produces client questions, website mission, technical brief, content-needed checklist, validation strategy suggestion, deployment checklist, and codex-build.prompt.md

scenarios.title: Generated prompts enforce the Northvalley technical baseline
scenarios.given: a future client website build prompt is generated
scenarios.when: the prompt describes the implementation stack and validation checks
scenarios.then: it requires Northvalley-Intelligence repo target, main branch, Next.js, TypeScript, React, npm, package-lock.json, Node 22, OpenNext Cloudflare, wrangler, ESLint, typecheck, Vitest, Playwright, and npm audit

scenarios.title: Unsupported assessment failure claims require evidence or verification
scenarios.given: an assessment mentions broken links, broken images, missing service-area pages, missing Google Business Profile, or missing schema without exact evidence
scenarios.then: it preserves exact evidence when available and otherwise marks the recommendation as verify-before-implementing

scenarios.title: The generated handoff is directly usable in a new repo
scenarios.given: a generated launch pack is complete
scenarios.when: Ferosh starts a new client website repo
scenarios.then: the codex-build.prompt.md is standalone and the client questions and content-needed checklist clearly separate launch-blocking items from post-launch items
